title: AE BRAIN COMMAND SITE — IMPLEMENTATION DIRECTIVE
subtitle: 2026 additive pass inside AE-Central-Command-Pack-CredentialHub-Launcher with donor-based live brain lane, runtime template replication, compare matrix, and stored smoke history
rule: Only smoke-backed implementations receive a green checkmark.
Each checked item includes the 2026 additive upgrade value for that implemented lane.

items.label: Added a new additive branch app inside this zip at Branching Apps/AE-Brain-Command-Site-v8-Additive/
Added offline-first single-page shell with dashboard, clients, AE brains, tasks, transcripts, and directive tabs
Added manifest + service worker files for installable/offline branch behavior
Added 13 named AE profiles in data/ae-roster.json
Added per-AE title, lane, specialties, client types, tone, headshot prompt, system prompt, key slot, caps, and enable flag
Added per-AE enable/disable controls in the AE Brains tab
Added per-AE cap override controls in the AE Brains tab
Added client intake form and local client ledger
Added auto-routing helper using AE specialties, lane, client type, caps, and assignment load
Added manual reassignment controls from the assignment-history panel
Added assignment history tracking per client
Added client export in JSON and CSV
Added bulk client actions with select-visible, bulk auto-assign, bulk manual assign, bulk export, and bulk delete
Added task board with create flow and quick status movement
Added transcript thread creation and message logging
Added transcript detail view with reply append flow
Added transcript full-text search across thread subjects, AE names, client names, and message text
Added directive file into the branch app and root pack
Added smoke script for the new branch app
Added smoke proof report generated from the smoke script
Added launcher-level links so this AE Brain app is reachable from the pack surface
Added directive auto-updater that rewrites the directive from smoke results after each future smoke pass
Added donor-based server brain runtime using the existing Kaixu brain lane pattern from the project docs and adapted it to the AE branch
Added live server-side AE brain chat lane that resolves the selected AE profile, applies that AE system prompt, and calls OpenAI with the AE-specific key slot
Mapped all 13 AE profiles to server-side AE_OPENAI_KEY_01 through AE_OPENAI_KEY_13 key lanes
Added a Live Brain tab in the branch app so the founder can open a thread, send a prompt, and log the live reply into transcript history
Added live brain health endpoint for branch-level deploy verification
Added founder sign-in, founder session check, and founder sign-out server functions for the AE branch
Added shared server-state snapshot lane backed by database-ready server code and schema for cross-device branch persistence
Added real root-level serverless APIs for founder auth, branch state sync, live brain chat, and live brain health
Added server-side usage-event and audit-event writes for live AE brain calls when the shared database lane is configured
Added dedicated database schema file for AE branch shared state, usage events, and audit events
Added true upstream OpenAI SSE streaming lane from the AE branch UI through the server route and back into transcript logging
Added multi-user owner/admin/operator/viewer RBAC lane for the AE branch beyond the single-founder session path
Added normalized per-resource serverless APIs for clients, tasks, threads, messages, assignments, and access users instead of relying only on snapshot sync
Added multi-vendor provider failover lane with OpenAI primary and Anthropic/Gemini fallback-ready routes per AE brain
Added remote AE roster override API plus database-backed server merge for enabled flags, cap overrides, provider, and model overrides
Added usage summary API and dashboard/server-health summary lane for remote AE token and call visibility
Added remote audit-events API and dashboard rendering for recent server-side branch activity
Added package.json, netlify.toml, deploy runbook, and richer env example so the pack is deployment-ready instead of only code-present
Added batch live smoke route and branch UI so the founder can run the donor brain lane across the roster and export a smoke JSON result set
Added per-AE runtime editor for provider, model, and failover providers with remote save hook into the AE roster override API
Added access-user admin actions for enable/disable and delete so owner/admin control is not limited to create-only
Added donor runtime template API and shared template helper so one brain configuration can be replicated across all 13 AE key lanes
Added OpenAI Responses-mode support in the donor runtime so the branch can switch between chat completions and responses without rebuilding the 13-brain lane
Added multi-AE compare matrix route and branch UI so one prompt can be run across selected AE brains with latency, provider, route, and reply capture
Added stored smoke-report history lane with database-backed report writes, listing route, and branch UI load controls
Added client stage + priority fields, filters, and dashboard summary counts for intake/active urgency control
Added selected-client dossier with linked tasks, linked threads, and one-click create-task/create-thread actions
Added transcript export in JSON + Markdown plus thread-to-task promotion flow from transcript detail
Added unavailable-AE rebalance action that reassigns clients away from disabled or over-cap AE lanes
Added client save/bind hardening so the client form no longer hits the broken undefined AE save path or duplicate table-control rebinding
Added syntax-gated smoke coverage across the branch UI and AE serverless routes before directive regeneration
Added client follow-up date lane with overdue/today queue counts and dashboard next-action queue
Added duplicate-watch intake lane with live match preview and pre-save duplicate warning
Added saved client filter presets with one-click load, reset, and delete controls
Added selected-client activity timeline plus dossier export in JSON and Markdown
Added ranked AE candidate insights inside the client dossier using scored routing output instead of single-match only

sections.title: V16 CLIENT CONTROL + FOLLOW-UP QUICK ACTIONS

items.label: Added page-level binder dispatch so dashboard, clients, live brain, tasks, transcripts, and access controls rebind after every render instead of leaving dead controls
Added true client edit mode with update-save path, edit-in-form action, mode banner, and cancel-edit control instead of create-only intake behavior
Added bulk selected-client stage and priority operations so operators can advance or reprioritize multiple accounts in one pass
Added one-click follow-up quick actions in the dashboard queue and client dossier for +1 day, +7 days, and complete follow-up handling

sections.title: V17 TASK OPS + TRANSCRIPT STATE CONTROL

items.label: Added task due-state analytics with overdue/today/upcoming counts plus a dashboard task queue with one-click open, snooze, and complete actions
Added true task edit mode with update-save path, edit-in-form action, and cancel-edit control instead of create-only task capture
Added task search and filter controls for query, status, AE, client, and due-state so operators can work filtered queues instead of a blind flat list
Added transcript thread pin/reopen/resolve state controls plus state filtering so thread triage can be controlled from the list and detail views

sections.title: V18 TASK BULK OPS + FOLLOW-UP AUTOMATION

items.label: Added task bulk selection with select-visible, bulk status, bulk snooze, bulk export, and bulk delete controls so operators can manage queues in batches
Added saved task filter presets with one-click load and delete controls so recurring task queues can be reopened instantly
Added follow-up-to-task automation from the dashboard queue, selected-client dossier, and selected-client bulk controls so next actions can become dated tasks instantly
Added dashboard operational snapshot export in JSON and Markdown covering roster load, client mix, follow-up pressure, task state, transcript volume, and remote lane status

sections.title: V19 CLIENT HEALTH + ACTION PLAN AUTOMATION

items.label: Added client health scoring, health counts, dossier health indicators, and client health filtering so operators can work risk by account condition instead of only stage/priority
Added an at-risk dashboard queue with one-click open and action-plan launch controls so the riskiest accounts surface immediately on the command page
Added a task template library with task-form apply/create controls plus client-context interpolation so recurring work can be launched without rewriting the same task details
Added client action plan automation from the client dossier, at-risk dashboard queue, and bulk selected-client controls so multi-step dated recovery/growth work can be created instantly

sections.title: V41 HYBRID STORAGE + NEON SNAPSHOT BRIDGE

items.label: Added hybrid local storage preservation plus IndexedDB state storage inside the AE branch app so browser persistence no longer depends only on localStorage.
Added dedicated Neon storage sync endpoint plus state-version and storage-sync SQL ledgers so indexed snapshots can be mirrored into the server-side database lane.

sections.title: V42 SKYE MEDIA CENTER + ARTIST SHARE UPGRADE

items.label: Added Skye Media Center as a new artist-first branch app with music uploads, searchable releases, photo drops, pre-release surfaces, and public artist pages.

Added Neon-backed media metadata API and SQL schema for artists, releases, and media entries so the Media Center has real server-side storage lanes in addition to local IndexedDB.
